title: ceriscus fragrans
intro: Ceriscus fragrans, also known as the fragrant tree or yellow hawthorn, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India, China, and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Ceriscus fragrans include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
